title: Dota 2 Counters & Combos
tagline: Who beats a hero, who it beats, and who it works well with.

error.hint: Run the pipeline (cd pipeline && npm run fetch-data) and rebuild, or check that heroData.json is present.

landing.heroSub: Instantly see who counters any hero, who they combo with, and the best pick against the enemy team — each with a plain-English reason.

ch1.title: Know who beats who
ch1.body: Pick a hero and instantly see who counters it and who it stomps — each backed by real OpenDota win-rate data and a one-line reason.

ch2.title: Find your power pairings
ch2.body: See which heroes combo with your pick — the disables, follow-ups, and synergies that win teamfights.

ch3.title: Win the draft
ch3.body: Add your team and the enemy team, and get a ranked list of the best heroes to pick next — by synergy with your allies and matchup against your enemies.

landing.climaxBody: 127 heroes, updated every patch. Works in English and ไทย. No login, completely free.
landing.footer: Not affiliated with Valve. Hero data from

draft.empty: Pick heroes for either team to see suggested picks.
draft.suggestionsSub: Ranked by synergy with your team and matchup vs the enemy team.
draft.noSuggestions: No clear suggestions for the current picks.

placeholder.title: Pick a hero
placeholder.body: Select a hero above to see its counters, favourable matchups, and synergies.

banner: Patch {patch} is new — counter data may still be settling.

counteredBy.title: Countered by
counteredBy.subtitle: Heroes that tend to beat this hero — avoid or respect them.
counteredBy.empty: No strong counters at the current sample size.

counters.title: Counters
counters.subtitle: Heroes this hero beats well — good picks into them.
counters.empty: No standout favourable matchups at the current sample size.

synergies.title: Works well with
synergies.subtitle: Teammates whose kits combine well with this hero.

best.title: Best items
best.subtitle: Most-built core items on {name} (from real match data).
best.empty: No item-build data for this hero yet.

counter.title: Counter items
counter.subtitle: Itemization that blunts {name}'s strengths.
counter.empty: No standout item counters for this hero.

detail.winrate: {delta} win rate vs this hero's average
detail.hint: Bars show how strong each matchup and combo is for this hero.

ability.title: Ability counters
ability.subtitle: Key spell interactions — what this hero shuts down, and what shuts it down.
